title: Support - Device page with headset disconnected
scenario: User views device details modal for a disconnected headset from the Support section after app restart
steps: Ensure a previously disconnected headset is visible on the Home Screen
expected: A modal slides up from the bottom of the screen displaying device details (Device Name, Product ID, Serial Number, Software Version, Headset Revision, Last Connected) along with instructions to send detailed information to Support, and a "Go" button.
